text: The shift from a sterile, corporate corridor to the colorful, vibrant display evokes a sense of curious anticipation. In the first space, behind glass barriers and soft lighting, I feel an alienation, as if on the threshold of something not yet revealed. But stepping into the second scene, awash with color and thought-provoking installations, my mind awakens. Here, surrounded by questions and the hum of innovation, I feel engaged and contemplative, as if invited to ponder both the worlds of machines and the nature of my own consciousness.
